etymology.description: semantic 彣 (wén, "variegated; literary talent") + phonetic 厂 (hǎn) -> talented
etymology.interpretation: The character 彥(yàn, "talented") combines the semantic 彣(wén, "variegated; literary talent"), suggesting refined beauty or diversity in talents, with the phonetic 厂(hǎn), providing the sound. This indicates a person of distinguished ability or literary talent.
